title: FLOSS Weekly 494: Linstor
summary:
Philipp Reisner is founder and CEO of LINBIT in Vienna, Austria. His professional career has been dominated by developing DRBD, a storage replication for Linux. Today he leads a company of about 30 employees with locations in Vienna, Austria and Portland, Oregon. In 2018 LINBIT launched LINSTOR – a management tool for storage volumes. It provides persistent Linux block storage for Kubernetes and OpenShift environments. It can also be used independently to control DRBD resources.
Download or subscribe to this show at https://twit.tv/shows/floss-weekly
Here's what's coming up for FLOSS in the future.
Think your open source project should be on FLOSS Weekly? Email Randal at merlyn@stonehenge.com
